qsforge.release_notes: Fixes 3D preview reliability on real-world Revit models. Internal viewer pipeline migrated from COLLADA (ColladaLoader) to glTF (GLTFLoader) via a trimesh-based DAE→GLB conversion step. Element-ID rebinding handles DDC's many-to-one node/geometry structure. Z-up→Y-up rotation applied client-side. Cache schema bumped v1→v2 (auto-invalidates 1.0.0 caches; first re-analysis recreates them).

ddc.release_notes: DDC ships bundled inside the QSForge installer; no separate download yet.
